name: Mom's Fish Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together until smooth and creamy consistency. Set aside and refrigerate for up to 1 to 1 1/2 weeks.
2. Prepare the fish: Clean and remove head and tail from 3 to 4 pounds, 12 to 15 inch length of fish fillets.
3. Season the fish with black pepper, red (cayenne) pepper, and salt.
4. Brush the fish filets with the fish marinade.
5. Fry the fish in a small amount of olive oil over medium to medium-high flame, turning only once until fully cooked.
6. Serve immediately.
